description: raw_posts + extractions_intel 完整 schema (CREATE TABLE)

schemas.raw_posts:
CREATE TABLE raw_posts (
    post_id        TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
    source_id      TEXT    NOT NULL,
    platform       TEXT    NOT NULL,
    published_at   TEXT    NOT NULL,        -- ISO 8601, e.g. 2026-06-25T23:14:45+00:00
    captured_at    TEXT    NOT NULL,        -- 落 DB 时间 (raw 抓取 / Apify 抓取)
    raw_text       TEXT    NOT NULL,        -- 推文原文
    raw_url        TEXT    NOT NULL,        -- https://x.com/handle/status/post_id
    raw_json       TEXT,                    -- 完整 Apify JSON (含 media/thread/reply_to)
    content_hash   TEXT    NOT NULL,        -- MD5 of raw_text
    is_deleted     INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
    archive_url    TEXT
)
schemas.extractions_intel:
CREATE TABLE extractions_intel (
    id                          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    post_id                     TEXT NOT NULL,
    source_id                   TEXT NOT NULL,        -- tw_jukan05 / tw_aleabitoreddit / tw_zephyr_z9 / tw_austinsemis
    extracted_at                TEXT NOT NULL,        -- ISO 8601
    model_version               TEXT NOT NULL,        -- deepseek-v4-pro
    prompt_version              TEXT NOT NULL,        -- v2.0.1-intel
    raw_response                TEXT NOT NULL,        -- 完整 LLM JSON 响应
    ticker                      TEXT,                -- JSON array, e.g. '["MU", "SNDK"]' 或 null
    company                     TEXT,                -- JSON array, e.g. '["Micron"]' 或 null
    direction                   TEXT NOT NULL,       -- 'long' | 'short' | 'neutral'
    short_skeptical             INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,  -- 仅 short 方向生效
    bottleneck                  TEXT,                -- HBM/光通信/CPO/存储/AI算力/InP/Substrate/封装 等
    attribution                 TEXT,                -- 'ORIGINAL' | 'RELAYED' | 'RC' | 'NA'
    rebuts_narrative            TEXT,                -- 作者反驳的主流叙事 (短句引用)
    summary_100                 TEXT,                -- ≤100 字客观概括
    is_retrospective            INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- R12: victory_lap 回顾
    is_disclosure               INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- R12: position_disclosure 持仓披露
    is_self_reported_returns    INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,  -- R12: 自报收益
    UNIQUE(post_id, prompt_version)
)
